title: Thiruvananthapuram, Kerala — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Thiruvananthapuram, Kerala: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Thiruvananthapuram is a city in Kerala with a population of 1,680,000. The capital of Kerala, a coastal city known for its beaches, backwaters, ancient temples, and space research center at VSSC.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
